The '''''Starry Ice''''' was one of the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operation. It was a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Action V transport]].

==Capabilities==
Like many of the starships of Karrde's smuggling operation, the ''Starry Ice'' was heavily modified, similarly to the ''[[Wild Karrde]].'' She was armed with a trio of [[turbolaser]]s and carried a single [[Defender starfighter]] as a reconnaissance craft.

==History==
The ship led a group of freighters that were [[Second ambush in the Graveyard|ambushed]] at [[the Graveyard]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].

It was stationed on [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was brought to Karrde's base of operations there. When [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] arrived, everyone who knew of Skywalker's presence was sent to prepare the ''Starry Ice'' for launch so as to keep this information hidden from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] warlord.

Also present at the [[Smugglers' Alliance]] meeting on [[Hijarna]], several crew members from the ''Starry Ice'' helped search the ''[[Wild Karrde]]'' for an [[Niles Ferrier's wraith|intruder]].

When the Smuggler's Alliance and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|attacked]] [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi]], ''Starry Ice'' was present along with ''[[Dawn Beat]]'', ''[[Lastri's Ort]]'', ''[[Amanda Fallow]]'', and several others.<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref> Eventually [[Shirlee Faughn]] became the ship's [[Captain/Legends|captain]].

At the beginning of the [[Caamas Document Crisis]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], the ''Starry Ice,'' alongside [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], assisted and rescued Luke Skywalker from the self-destruction of the [[Cavrilhu Pirates|Cavrillhu Pirates]] [[Kauron asteroid field|Kauron asteroid base]]. The ship, alongside Skywalker, would fight their way free of the pirates automated defenses<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>. Later, the ''Ice'' would investigate the hyperspace courses of a pair of [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|Chiss Clawcraft]] to the planet [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]]. Jade would take the ship's Defender to investigate the planet.

==Behind the scenes==
"''Starry Ice''" may be a pun on the term "starry eyes." This would be in line with Talon Karrde's habit of naming his starships with puns.
